title: Which platforms and AI systems does AEO apply to beyond ChatGPT and Perplexity?
answer: AEO applies far beyond ChatGPT and Perplexity. It covers the full set of answer engines and AI systems that synthesize and cite content, including Google AI Overviews and AI Mode, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Anthropic Claude, and voice assistants. Each retrieves differently, so AEO targets every surface where buyers get a synthesized answer.
